title: Correct existing provider response-delivery and request-surface requirements to match the current five-backend implementation
description: Correct existing provider response-delivery and request-surface requirements to match the current five-backend implementation
acceptance_criteria: The canonical requirements list all five existing backends; describe each implemented response delivery mechanism without calling AlgoChat polling token streaming; and distinguish Obsidian requestUrl from browser streaming fetch while production build typecheck and strict 100 percent SpecSync pass
